description: Sticky stuff...
name: Slime Jelly

description: Wing of a bat.
name: Bat Wing

description: Fang of a bat.
name: Bat Fang

description:
Petal of an unusually angry flower. Doesn't do much,
just sell it.
name: Wild Petal

description:
An herb that's pretty dry. Used as an ingredient for
certain herbal recipes.
name: Dried Herb

description:
A sunny grass herb thing. Used as an ingredient for
certain herbal recipes.
name: Sungrass

description:
A simple magical string used for making basic
jewelry.
name: Fate String

description: Refreshing drink. Heals 5 HP.
name: Bottled Water

description: An apple a day keeps the doctor away. Heals 20 HP.
name: Apple

description:
John's Backpack, with a name tag attached that says
"John."
name: John's Backpack

description:
A soothing potion made of dried herb and sungrass.
Recovers 40 HP, then 10 more HP for 3 turns.
name: Herbal Potion
note:
<Synthesis Ingredients>
Sungrass
Dried Herb
Bottled Water
</Synthesis Ingredients>

description:
A guide on how to craft basic items for noobie
patooties. At the front it says "Menu > Craft".
name: Noobie Crafting Guide

description: Tastes yucky, but heals 20 MP.
name: Bitter Tonic
note:
<Synthesis Ingredients>
Dried Herb: 2
Bottled Water
</Synthesis Ingredients>

description: Goes Kaboom! when you throw it at an enemy.
name: Boom Scroll

description: Stops an enemy from moving.
name: Stun Scroll

description: Very shiny and sparkly! Sells for a good price.
name: Fairy Dust

description:
A magical stone that teleports you back to the
adventurer's guild.
name: Escape Stone

description:
Spooky spirit flame thing. If you listen closely, you
can hear some really angry whispers.
name: Grudge

description:
Some weird glowing thing you get from Statues of
Luck.
name: Proof of Life

description: Heals Burns and Bleeds.
name: Skin Cream

description: Throw at an enemy to deal great damage (sometimes)!
name: Banana Peel

description: So disgusting! Lowers the target's attack.
name: Puke Bottle

description: Bag with a name tag that says "Crippled Guy" on it.

description:
Scroll that teaches Dagger Spin - a dagger-exclusive

description: An empty bottle for... you know...
name: Empty Bottle

description:
Restores 60 HP, then 15 every 3 turns, but it tastes

name: Dogwater Potion

description: A key made of copper.
name: Copper Key

description: Contains some info about noob-tier enemies.
name: Noob's Guide

description: Venomous monster part.
name: Venom Gland

description:
I've got the eye of the spider, a fighter, dancing

name: Spider Eye

description: The leg of a spider.
name: Spider Leg

description:
Slows down a target and stops them from escaping or
flapping their wings.
name: Sticky Bomb

description: A normal ring that does absolutely nothing.

description:
Has a bunch of ancient letters that can magically
contain summons.
name: Binding Charm

description: Shiny and magical!
name: Mana Crystal

description:
Contains crafting recipes for basic F-rank items and

description: Heals 80 HP.

Strange piece of stone with some undecipherable

Can be offered to the Dungeon Shrines of any F-rank
dungeon.

description: Some metal scraps.
name: Goblin Scrap

description: Has an ugly goblin face on it.
name: Token of War

description: Fiery monster part.
name: Fire Gland

description:
Riles up all allies, increasing their attack and

Riles up all allies, increasing their attack and

Blows up on all enemies, but the damage wildly

Fire Gland: 1
Goblin Scrap: 2
</Synthesis Ingredients>

description:
A whole lot of whatever I don't know if you wanna know.

name: Stolen Rations

description:
Hits with a decent ranged attack that has a 25% chance
of causing bleed.
name: Throwing Knife

description: A fruit that gives 1000 XP.
name: XP Fruit

description:
The handwriting is terrible but whatever, it works.
Contains several recipes.
name: Goblin Scripts

description:
Scroll that teaches Aggression - a skill that buffs
target attack.

description:
Scroll that teaches Depression - a skill that debuffs
target attack.

description:
Scroll that teaches Mana Burst - a skill that explodes

name: Skill: Mana Burst

description:
Scroll that teaches Vanish - a skill that makes the
user more evasive and fast.
name: Skill: Vanish

description:
Scroll that teaches Backstab - a skill whose damage

description:
Scroll that teaches Maul - a skill that hits the
opponent 5 times, with some side effects.
name: Skill: Maul

description:
Scroll that teaches Barrier - a skill that provides an

name: Old Key

description: Heals 40 MP.

A whole lot of whatever I don't know if you wanna know.

I'm not so sure this is safe... strikes target and 2

Honey! Heals 30 HP and regenerates 30 HP for 5

How I wish it were only a dream... the bitter scent of
